name: Barbecued Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 large Lemon, cut into 14 thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off and discard chicken wing tips.
2. Arrange the chicken and lemon alternately in a rectangular microwavable dish, measuring 11 X 7 X 1 1/2 inches.
3. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 12 to 15 minutes, rotating the dish halfway through after 6 minutes until cooked through; drain.
4. Cover to keep warm.
5. Prepare Zesty Barbecue Sauce and pour evenly over the chicken.
6. Microwave uncovered for 3 to 4 minutes or until the sauce is hot.
